DataFormats.BookieServiceInfoFormat
public static final class DataFormats.BookieServiceInfoFormat.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<DataFormats.BookieServiceInfoFormat.Builder> implements DataFormats.BookieServiceInfoFormatOrBuilder
 *
 information about services exposed by a Bookie.
